title: Stainless Steel Colander 22.5cm, 3 Quart Micro-Perforated Food Strainer with Handles, Colander for Draining Washing Rinsing Steaming, Thickened Metal Sieve Ideal for Pasta Vegetables Fruit (22.5cm)
features: Sieves for Cooking– 3 qt metal colander is made of pure stainless steel without any coating, Premium material for no easily rusting, Heat resistant to hold hot food and better than plastic colanders.
Quick Draining – Micro-Perforated food strainer for draining water faster,Tiny holes for no worry about small foods(nuts, spaghetti, noodles) slipping through.
Sturdy Handle– 2 solid handles are welded firmly comfortable grip, Easy to hang on the kitchen hook to save space, Smooth edge and surface.
Stable Feet – 3 raised feet help the food strainer stand stably, 0.4 inch height helps drain all water away from your spaghetti or veggies but won’t touch to the sink.
Wide Uses – Perfectly used as normal kitchen colander as rice washer pasta drainer,Also can be used as a fruit or vegetable container and a steamer for pot, A great addition in your kitchen.
description: Product Description Rust resistant and dishwasher safe, Durable and reusable for a long-service life Big Strainer are also non-toxic, heat-resistant, rust-resistant and boast impressive durability compared to other plastic products. D-shaped handles are securely welded for easy lifting and transferring. They can also be used as hooks for hanging Strainers and Colanders in storage, saving valuable kitchen counter space. Strainers for Kitchen are odor-resistant, easy to clean and dishwasher safe. Comes with non-slip feet, ensuring stability whether Metal Colander are in mixing bowl, sink or on the countertop. Additionally, their nesting design allows for compact storage without taking up much space. A great choice for your daily home kitchen and usage in restaurants, hotels, etc
